candidate_definitions.text: Bottom-up attention model for image captioning and VQA, based on Faster R-CNN and Visual Genome
This code implements a bottom-up attention model, based on multi-gpu training of Faster R-CNN with ResNet-101, using object and attribute annotations from [Visual Genome](http://visualgenome.org/).
Automatic image captioning model based on Caffe, using features from bottom-up attention.

Simple yet high-performing image captioning model using Caffe and python. Using image features from [bottom-up attention](https://github.com/peteanderson80/bottom-up-attention), in July 2017 this model achieved state-of-the-art performance on all metrics of the [COCO captions te…
